{{Infobox concept
| name = OTEP
| introduced = cradle-13-threshold
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[OTEP]] is a system or entity [[Lindon]] can command to show stories.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[OTEP]] was created through a cooperation between [[Abidan]] craftsmen and the [[Vroshir]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[OTEP]] is a character who questioned [[Eithan]]'s rudeness.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
